catalog_content:
Item Name: McCormick Yellow Mustard Seed (Pack of 2)
Bullet Point 1: Premium #1 grade mustard seeds
Bullet Point 2: Adds tangy and subtle heat to various dishes
Bullet Point 3: Essential for pickling and imparts sharp zingy flavor
Bullet Point 4: Perfect for enhancing rich dishes like roast beef and ham
Bullet Point 5: Versatile for use in spice blends, marinades, chutneys, glazes, and rubs
Bullet Point 6: Enhances mild ingredients like potatoes, legumes, chicken, and seafood
Product Description: McCormick Yellow Mustard Seed is always sourced from #1 grade mustard seeds. It adds tangy subtle heat to pickling brines, rubs, seafood boils and so much more. Mustard seed is essential for sharp zingy flavor in anything pickled – dill sweet or bread & butter pickles, corn relish, pickled green beans or cauliflower. A favorite seasoning throughout the ages, its hot pungent flavor is perfect for cut-ting through rich dishes like roast beef, corned beef and ham. Use it in spice blends, marinades, chutneys and glazes and rubs for meats. Mustard seed works equally well kicking up the flavor of mild ingredients like potatoes, legumes, chicken and seafood. Add it to the dressing for potato salad or coleslaw or the steaming liquid for shrimp. (Pack of 2)
Value: 1.4
Unit: Ounce
overall_summary: Premium positioning with #1 grade mustard seeds, indicated by 'premium' labeling and high-quality glass jar packaging. Bundle deal with pack of 2 offers value for spice enthusiasts. Versatile culinary applications suggest broad appeal, but no organic or specialty certifications visible.
